series_metadata.series_title: Board of Executives of Long-Term Services & Supports (BELTSS) meeting minutes.
series_metadata.series_description: The Board has meeting minutes from past meetings in paper format.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Board Meeting Minutes will be kept in paper form for a period of 20 years. Once the 20-year period is reached, the meeting minutes will be scanned and transferred to the State Archives. ; Electronic: Board Meeting Minutes will be kept in electronic form for a period of 20 years. Once the 20-year period is reached, the meeting minutes will be deleted., Paper: Archives ; Electronic: Delete
